title: Aathadi Manasudhan Lyrics Kazhugu Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Aathadi Manasudhan
Singers: Priya
Lyrics: Na.Muthkumar
Music: Yuvan
Movie: Kazhugu

Aathadi manasudhaan, Rekkakatti parakuthu
Aanalum vayasudhaan, Kitta vara thayanguthu
Akkam pakkam paathu paathu
Aasaiyaaga veesum kaathu
Nenjukulla yedho pesuthe
Adada indha manasudhan,
Suthi suthi unna theduthe
Azhaga indha kolusudhan
Thathi thathi un peyar solludhe (Aathadi manasudhaan ..)

Kitta vandhu neeyum pesum pothu
kitta thotta kannu verthu pogum, Muche kaichala maarum
Vittu vittu una paakum pothu
Vetti vetti minnal onnu mothum, manase maargazhi maasam

Arugil unthan paasam intha kaathil veesuthu
Vizhi theruvil paarkum unaai urava theduthu
paavi nenja ena senja, unthan pera solli konja
Enna konnaalum opaathu un pera solvenada

Onna renda enna naanum solla
oraayiram aasa vachen ulla, pesa dhairiyam illa
Ulla oru vartha vandhu thulla
Ullam enna mutti mutti thalla,irundhum vetkathil sella

Kaalam muludhum naalum, unna paarthe vazhanum
Uyir pogum neram undhan madiyil saaindhe aaganaum
Unna thavira enna venum, vera enna ketka thonum
Nenjam unnoda vazhaama mannodu saayaadhada .

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Aathadi Manasudhan from the movie Kazhugu, a heartfelt composition by Yuvan Shankar Raja. Sung soulfully by Priya, this song captures the essence of love and longing with its evocative lyrics penned by Na Muthukumar. Immerse yourself in this timeless Tamil classic that continues to resonate with music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: This stanza lists the song's title, singer, lyricist, composer, and movie name.

Oh dear, the heart is flying with wings, yet it hesitates to come closer. Looking around, the breeze blows with desire. Something speaks within the heart. Oh dear, this heart searches for you, circling around. The anklet jingles beautifully, calling your name repeatedly.

When you come close and speak, my eyes shy away, and my breath changes. When I look at you intermittently, a spark strikes like lightning, and my heart feels like the month of Margazhi (a festive Tamil month).
Your affection nearby whispers in my ear. Searching for a connection, my sinful heart calls your name and cherishes it. Even if you harm me, I will still call your name.
I have countless desires to express to you, but I lack the courage to speak. Words arise within me, but my heart hesitates and pushes them back. Yet, I remain shy to proceed.

I wish to live my entire life seeing you every day. In my final moments, I want to rest in your embrace. I desire nothing else but you. My heart cannot live without you; it cannot merge with the earth.
